creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vinícius Zavam from comment #98)

afaik, we can definable see the difference on how the "clock ticking" behaves. right? I mean: using HEAD the offset increases around 0.140207 per minute; with RELEASE/12.1.0 it increases 0.003008



% bc
16.447002 - 16.306795
.140207

0.726101 - 0.723093
.003008
